query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A person with light brown glasses and a dark mustache wearing a cream and black patterned sweater holds a black Nikon Coolpix 5700 digital camera in one hand and a black Vivitar 2500 external flash unit in the other. The top of the camera reveals exposed colored wires and internal metal components where the flash mount sits. The person looks directly at the camera with wide eyes in a close-up indoor setting.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person with glasses and a dark mustache wearing a patterned sweater holds a broken Nikon Coolpix 5700 camera with a shattered hotshoe and exposed internal wiring, while separately holding a Vivitar external flash unit near the damaged camera. The close-up indoor portrait shows the subject with wide eyes staring directly at the viewer, foregrounding the material decay and degraded state of the photographic equipment.
